reports.description: A downed tree was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
references: Ochotnicza Straż Pożarna w Gilowie (on Facebook), 14 JUN 2026.

reports.description: A broken power line killed three horses in the morning hours. A power line was broken probably a day before in the evening. The time was based on radar data and PWS data.
references: "Trzy konie zginęły w Wielkopolsce! "Porażone prądem"", Super Express Poznań, 14 JUN 2026.

reports.description: A downed tree was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.

Numerous trees were snapped/uprooted and large tree branches were broken in Wrocław during the passage of a thunderstorm. Tram lines were damaged by falling tree branches, roads and railroads were blocked by downed trees. Power outages were reported.
A downed tree on the road was reported after the passage of a QLCS thunderstorm. Time was based on a radar data.
references: Ochotnicza Straż Pożarna w Malczycach (on facebook), 14 Jun 2026

reports.description: A tree was snapped by a strong wind related to a passing QLCS thunderstorm. Time was based on a radar data.
A roof of at least one residential building in Rosochata was either damaged or torn off during the passage of a QLCS thunderstorm. Time was based on a radar data.
references: Nawałnica przeszła nad Legnicą i powiatem, lca.pl, 13 Jun 2026

reports.description: A roof was damaged (fallen roof tiles) after the passage of a QLCS thunderstorm. Time was based on a radar data.
Numerous trees were downed in Legnica during the passage of a QLCS thunderstorm. Time was based on radar data.
references: Nawałnica przeszła nad Legnicą i powiatem, lca.pl, 13 Jun 2026

reports.description: A downed tree was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
Downed trees were reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
A tree was uprooted by a strong wind related to a passing QLCS thunderstorm. Time was based on a radar data.
references: Łukasz Kuliński - Wielkopolski Łowca Burz (on facebook), 13 Jun 2026

reports.description: Numerous trees were reportedly damaged and large tree branches were snapped in Poznań during the passage of a thunderstorm. Time was based on a radar data.
references: Ulewa i burza w Wielkopolsce. Strażacy odebrali już ponad 130 zgłoszeń, epoznan.pl, 13 Jun 2026

reports.description: Numerous trees were uprooted and tree branches were snapped by a passing QLCS thunderstorm in Bolesławiec. Time was based on a radar data.
references: Nawałnica nad Bolesławcem i powiatem. Strażacy walczą z jej skutkami, istotne.pl, 13 Jun 2026

reports.description: Multiple trees and large tree branches were downed on a road between Tarnowa and Błocko during the passage of a QLCS thunderstorm.
Multiple trees were downed in Jerzykowice Wielkie, likely during the passage of a convective cell. Time was based on a radar data.
Multiple trees were downed on a road between Lemierzyce, Głuchowo and Lemierzycko during the passage of a thunderstorm. Time was based on a radar data.
A downed tree was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
A downed tree was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.

Numerous trees were downed and large tree branches were snapped in Solec Kujawski after the passage of a thunderstorm. Local rope park and power lines were damaged by falling trees. Catering tent was blown away by the wind.
references: Kilkadziesiąt interwencji straży pożarnej po burzy. W Bydgoszczy konar drzewa przygniótł kobietę, Express Bydgoski, 13 Jun 2026

reports.description: A woman was injured by a falling tree branch during the passage of a thunderstorm in Bydgoszcz (Bartodzieje district). Time was based on a radar data. Numerous trees were snapped or uprooted. At least one car was damaged by a falling tree. A roof of a hospital was damaged (Bielawy district)
references: Kilkadziesiąt interwencji straży pożarnej po burzy. W Bydgoszczy konar drzewa przygniótł kobietę, Express Bydgoski, 13 Jun 2026
Około 60 interwencji straży pożarnej. To skutek burzy, która przeszła przez województwo kujawsko-pomorskie, Nowości, 13 Jun 2026
Burza i silny wiatr nad regionem. Na kobietę w Bydgoszczy spadło drzewo, uszkodzony dach w szpitalu! , TVP3 Bydgoszcz, 13 Jun 2026

reports.description: A downed tree was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
Damaged roof was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
A long funnel cloud extending to approximately 80% of the cloud base-to-ground distance was observed. Ground contact was likely.
references: Eyewitness report via Sieć Obserwatorów Burz (on Facebook), 13 JUN 2026.

reports.description: Plausible Tornado (50-70% CGD). Damage also reported, but unconfirmed so far. Update will follow when more information is available. [EDIT, 15.06.2026, Igor Laskowski] Tornado confirmed.
references: "Rychnovskem se v sobotu prohnalo tornádo. Poškodilo střechy, náhrobky a vyvrátilo stromy",  Zprávy ČR, 15 JUN 2026.
